news.summary: Datadog, Inc (NASDAQ: DDOG) outperformed expectations in the first quarter, with a 25% year-over-year revenue growth to $761.55 million, surpassing the expected $741.52 million. Their adjusted EPS of 46 cents also exceeded the consensus of 43 cents. The company's co-founder and CEO, Olivier Pomel, highlighted the successful execution during this period, achieving $272 million in operating cash flow and $244 million in free cash flow. For the upcoming quarter, Datadog anticipates revenue between $787 million and $791 million, higher than the estimated $772.13 million, with projected adjusted EPS between $0.40 and $0.42. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Datadog (NASDAQ: DDOG) beats Q1 estimates with $761.55 million revenue, 25% growth. Raises Q2 revenue outlook to $787-791 million. CEO cites strong performance.

news.summary: In the first quarter, the company that provides ride-hailing and food-delivery services disclosed a combination of positive and negative financial outcomes. The CEO of Uber mentioned that the business was performing well, despite this statement, the stock experienced a decline following the Q1 financial report.
news.headline: Uber reported mixed results in Q1. Despite "humming" business, stock fell after report. More details on Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: Heading into the company's Q1 earnings report, Shopify stock has decreased by 12% in 2025. The focus is on the impact of Trump tariffs on the company's 2025 guidance. The potential effects of the tariffs will be closely watched as investors await further updates on the company's performance.
news.headline: Shopify stock down 12% in 2025 pre-Q1 earnings. Looking at Trump tariff impact in 2025 guidance.

news.summary: Disney has exceeded subscriber and entertainment revenue estimates. The company is set to launch a new theme park in the UAE. Warner Bros. is planning its next move. Disney's stock showed impressive growth following these results, driven by the success of Disney+ and the anticipation surrounding the upcoming Abu Dhabi theme park.
news.headline: Disney stock surges on beating estimates for subscriber numbers and entertainment revenue, plans for new theme park in UAE.

news.summary: On Wednesday, Sarepta's stock experienced a significant decline due to two main factors. Firstly, the company reduced its sales outlook for 2025. Secondly, a crucial FDA appointment negatively impacted the stock. This led to Sarepta's stock falling to its lowest point in eight years.
news.headline: Sarepta stock hits eight-year low due to lowered 2025 sales outlook and FDA appointment concerns.

news.summary: A skilled Sales Leader has been appointed to drive international growth as part of a global expansion strategy at PLT Health Solutions, Inc. The company, based in Morristown, N.J., revealed this development on May 7, 2025. As a prominent worldwide supplier of premium health and wellness ingredients supported by science, PLT Health Solutions is ramping up its efforts to scale up operations.
news.headline: PLT Health Solutions promotes Mark Stephens as VP of Global Sales for international growth.

news.summary: Legislation in New Hampshire has been approved to establish a bitcoin reserve, while the state's Senate is set to deliberate on a stablecoin bill. The price of bitcoin has experienced significant fluctuations, reaching a peak of $97,000. The recent development has sparked increased interest in investment strategies related to bitcoin, leading to a rise in Bitcoin ETFs. The positive trend in bitcoin has been reinforced by the behavior of gold prices, sending a favorable signal to the bitcoin market.
news.headline: New Hampshire approves bitcoin reserve, Senate to vote on stablecoin bill. Bitcoin price swings to $97,000, gold signals.

news.summary: JetBlue proudly revealed today that it has been recognized as the leading airline for first/business class customer satisfaction in the recent J.D. Power 2025 North America Airline Satisfaction Study. This position was secured thanks to the exceptional performance of JetBlue’s Mint® premium experience, which has significantly raised the standards for business-class air travel. The service offers unparalleled comfort and outstanding customer service at a more affordable price point, setting a new benchmark for the industry. Additionally, JetBlue excelled by claiming the top spot in five out of the seven dimensions evaluated in the study.
news.headline: JetBlue awarded best airline for first/business class satisfaction by J.D. Power. #1 in 5 dimensions. Reshaping premium flying.

news.summary: The American Chemistry Council (ACC) recently recognized outstanding leaders in sustainability and responsible care at their annual conference held in FT. LAUDERDALE, Fla on May 7, 2025. The ACC celebrated winners who demonstrated excellence in promoting ethical practices within the chemical industry. This accolade highlighted the importance of sustainable initiatives with a focus on environmental responsibility and safety.
news.headline: ACC awards chemical companies for safety and sustainability efforts at 2025 conference in Fort Lauderdale.

news.summary: A unique collaboration between the food and fashion industries has led to the creation of White Castle-themed roller skates in Columbus, Ohio. On May 7, 2025, it was announced that the iconic fast-food chain has introduced a new product that combines style with functionality. The innovative shoes feature design elements inspired by White Castle's menu and branding, offering a fresh take on footwear. This merger has resulted in a new way for fans to show their love for White Castle, with the company's distinctive visuals now rolling on wheels.
news.headline: White Castle partners with Heelys for new wheels-on-shoes launching on May 15, 2025. Fun fusion of food and fashion.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in Barcelona, Spain, INDIBA, a prominent company specializing in TECAR, laser, and regenerative medicine, revealed that NBA forward Michael Porter Jr. has joined them as an athletic ambassador. Porter, recognized for his resilience, exceptional athleticism, and advocacy for mental health, will represent the brand worldwide.

news.summary: A recent report titled "Project Insight - Global Oil and Gas Construction Projects (Q1 2025)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report monitors oil and gas construction projects globally, totaling a value of $3.3 trillion, covering stages from pre-planning to execution. The majority of projects are in advanced stages, namely pre-execution and execution, which represent $2.2 trillion or 65% of the total projects. The report offers analysis conducted by the analyst specializing in construction trends.
news.headline: "Report: $3.3 trillion in oil and gas construction projects, majority in late stages. - ResearchAndMarkets.com"

news.summary: A study conducted over the course of one year and recently published in the respected journal Stroke has confirmed the efficacy of paired vagus nerve stimulation therapy in enhancing upper limb function. The study was carried out in AUSTIN, Texas, and the results were shared on May 7, 2025. The company behind this therapy, MicroTransponder®, Inc., is a well-established medical technology firm. The findings of this study underscore the significant impact of paired vagus nerve stimulation in improving upper limb function, offering promising advancements in medical technology.
news.headline: Stroke survivors show long-term motor improvement with Vivistim therapy, validated by a 1-year follow-up study.

(ATS), a prominent provider of industrial maintenance and reliability solutions, has proudly disclosed its acknowledgment by Newsweek as a top-ranking workplace for mental wellbeing in America for the year 2025. The specifics of the voting rights affected were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.summary: XRP price rose 2% on May 7 due to US-China trade talk optimism, with key support at $2.08 crucial for sustained recovery. Whale accumulation signals XRP strength, with large entities holding 9.44% of total XRP supply. Analysts suggest XRP must remain above $1.83-$2.00 support to continue upside. XRP price remains above $2.00, with potential for new all-time highs above $3.40. Traders wait for clear directional bias as XRP derivatives data show modest OI rise to $3.65 billion, despite a 17% drop in trading volume to $3.9 billion. Critical levels to watch are the 200-day SMA at $2.08 and key support at $1.83. Analysts believe XRP is still bullish, poised for new highs if it remains above $1.60. No investment advice, as all investment moves involve risk; readers should conduct their research.
news.headline: XRP price up 2% on May 7, aims for $4. Key support at $2.08 crucial for uptrend. Whales accumulating, OI rises. Analysts bullish on XRP.

news.summary: Safeheron, a digital asset infrastructure provider in Singapore, has unveiled an open-source Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) framework aimed at enhancing security and privacy in Web3 sectors like DeFi, payment services, and decentralized autonomous organizations. The framework is the first using the Intel SGX SDK and modern C++. Safeheron aims to address concerns about closed systems in light of increasing security incidents. Trusted Execution Environments secure code and data within CPU enclaves, with sectors in Web3 like privacy-focused blockchains, DeFi, and payment services already employing TEEs. Safeheron's TEE framework enables clients to create enclaves using cloud services supporting Intel SGX servers. The company has served over 100 clients, including MetaMask, with a cumulative transfer volume surpassing $100 billion. In August 2022, Safeheron raised $7 million in pre-Series A funding for research, development, and business expansion. Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has proposed adding a TEE to the Ethereum ecosystem for enhanced user privacy. Safeheron also secured MetaMask as a client in August 2022, with TEEs potentially mitigating threats in systems like SNARKs. Imperial College London's study noted TEEs could protect against attacks within the system.
news.headline: Safeheron unveils open-source Intel SGX TEE framework for Web3 security. Clients incl. MetaMask. $100B+ TX volume. $7M funding. Ethereum eyes TEE for privacy.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in Washington, Governor Kevin Stitt of Oklahoma delivered on his promise by signing the Firearm Industry Nondiscrimination (FIND) Act into law. During the NSSF SHOT Show® Governors' Forum, Gov. Stitt had pledged to support the bill if it reached his desk, and he fulfilled this commitment. The FIND Act aims to address issues of discrimination within the firearm industry. This move was celebrated by the National Shooting Sports Foundation (NSSF) and garnered attention at the event.
news.headline: NSSF celebrates Oklahoma Gov. Stitt for signing FIND Act, honoring his promise at NSSF SHOT Show® Governors' Forum.

news.summary: In Evansville, Indiana, Metronet, recognized as the top internet provider in the country for two years in a row by PCMag, is extending its advanced fiber-optic network to West Bloomfield Township, Michigan. With a substantial private investment in the multimillion-dollar range, this initiative will provide residents and businesses with high-speed internet, offering symmetrical speeds of up to five gigabits per second for households and up to ten gigabits per second for commercial operations. The project is focused on enhancing connectivity and improving internet capabilities in the area.
news.headline: Metronet bringing 100% fiber internet to West Bloomfield Township, Michigan with symmetrical speeds up to 5 gigabits for homes and 10 gigabits for businesses.

news.summary: Electronic Arts, Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) announced impressive fourth-quarter earnings, surpassing expectations with earnings of $1.58 per share compared to the estimated $1.09. Quarterly revenue also exceeded predictions, reaching $1.8 billion instead of the expected $1.56 billion. Andrew Wilson, CEO of Electronic Arts, attributed the success to the popularity of College Football and EA SPORTS, which led to another record year. Additionally, The Sims contributed significantly to the historic performance in Q4 of FY25. Looking ahead, the company anticipates net bookings for fiscal year 2026 to range between $7.6 billion and $8 billion.
news.headline: Electronic Arts exceeds Q4 earnings with $1.58 per share, $1.8 billion quarterly revenue, and increased forecasts.

news.summary: In New York today, CheckedUp, a leading digital media network in healthcare locations nationwide, unveiled two new media products during the 2025 IAB NewFronts event. The first is a collection of original TV programs available for streaming exclusively on the CheckedUp Network. The second product introduces IAB compliant programmatic features throughout its digital network across the nation. This marks CheckedUp's inaugural appearance at the IAB NewFronts and signifies a significant achievement in the company's goal to revolutionize the healthcare media landscape.
news.headline: CheckedUp introduces two original TV series and programmatic advertising at 2025 IAB NewFronts.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on May 7, 2025, Georgia-Pacific and other manufacturers are enhancing operations by utilizing a combination of SAS artificial intelligence technology and Epic Games' engine. SAS is at the forefront of revolutionizing manufacturing processes by introducing advanced digital twins. This innovative approach integrates SAS' expertise, allowing companies to improve efficiency and productivity.
news.headline: SAS and Unreal Engine partner to enhance manufacturing operations with digital twins, improving processes.
